arts.ttl: Harsh reviews of £5m Leeds United signing don’t add up, he’s on track for a brilliant season already
arts.sum: So far, the right-back has been the most tested out of any Leeds player out of possession, with Fellows trying his luck at every opportunity for Corberan’s Baggies, but two more direct wingers have been largely locked up by Bogle in Sheffield Wednesday’s Anthony Musaba, and Hull City’s Liam Millar. Leeds United signed Jayden Bogle from Sheffield United for a reported £5million, and his performances are yet to generate major hype despite his known credentials at this level.

arts.ttl: Ranked: Liam Cooper’s top five Leeds United moments as he confirms emotional exit
arts.sum: Leeds United centre-back Liam Cooper has left the club after the expiry of his contract in the summer, ending 10 years at Elland Road in the process. The side that won promotion at Elland Road in 2020 is no longer intact at all as four years have passed, with emotional farewells coming ever since.

arts.ttl: Leeds United line-up vs Burnley with Aaronson doubt and Ramazani temptation
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has been deprived of the majority of his Leeds United squad for the past 13 days and those who have been away have been working to different tactical plans while picking up knocks and bumps along the way. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Red Bull have 'huge budget' as Leeds United set for £40m cash injection - Kieran Maguire
arts.sum: Red Bull’s inherent commercial focus makes them one of the most controversial ownership groups in football and their investment in Leeds United has been met...

arts.ttl: Leeds United tweak could be imminent as Daniel Farke faces triple selection headache
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Willy Gnonto has shown his versatility to play on either wing for the club, but his Italy u21 outing this week suggests he could be worth trying out in a central position. Willy Gnonto given central attacking role for Italy u21s

arts.ttl: Burnley handed major boost for Elland Road trip and forward gears up for Leeds United reunion
arts.sum: United will always hold a special place in Clarets winger Jaidon Anthony's heart. He has reflected on the "unbelievable" support he received from the fan-base following the tragic passing of his mother Donna in January in the midst of his season-long loan spell last term.

arts.ttl: Maxime Esteve becomes latest Burnley man to commit long-term future to the club
arts.sum: Maxime Esteve has become the latest of Burnley’s star men to commit his long-term future to the club.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson sends blunt Premier League warning to ex-Leeds United star Crysencio Summerville
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundit Paul Merson believes Crysencio Summerville may "find it hard" to make a big impact in the Premier League after swapping Leeds United for West Ham United. Over a month has elapsed since Summerville, who was named last season's Championship Player of the Year, headed to London to join the Hammers in a £25m deal.

arts.ttl: Leeds United key attacking midfield target is heading to Galatasaray for £5m
arts.sum: Leeds United were pushing to sign attacking midfielder Roland Sallai from Freiburg during the summer, and he’s now heading to Galatasaray for a reported £5million fee. Two prominent names featured in reports when looking at who Leeds might sign as an attacking midfielder before the window shut – one was Sheffield United’s Gustavo Hamer, and the other was Freiburg’s Roland Sallai.

arts.ttl: CEO namedrops four star players Leeds United rejected bids for this summer
arts.sum: Leeds United CEO Angus Kinnear has suggested the club rejected bids for Wilfried Gnonto, Illan Meslier, Pascal Struijk… The post CEO namedrops four star players Leeds United rejected bids for this summer appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
